name: JOCOM HOLDINGS CORP.
business: Jocom Holdings Corp. provides data analytic services that analyze customer buying patterns and predict customer behavior for grocery items, assisting e-commerce businesses and grocery retailers in optimizing product placements. Its services are delivered through a proprietary subscription-based web software, the JOCOM AI Smart Platform. The company's sole client is a related-party e-commerce platform operator in Malaysia.

exposures.sentence: The Company currently provides data analytic services in relation to analyzing customers buying patterns as it relates to grocery items.. It also makes predictions on customers consumption manners, and assists e-commerce businesses and grocery retailers in optimizing their product placements with customers.
